full_text:
Xiang Zhuang 項莊
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Zhuang (項莊). Younger cousin of Xiang Yu. Attempted to kill Liu Bang at Fan Zeng’s behest. Xiang Zhuang was affiliated with Chu.
